headline: Everything Is Fine, Says Man Who Clearly Does Not Know What Is Going On
Local Man Writes Article, Nobody Knows Why Or How
Jorji Costava Has Some Thoughts, Please Do Not Read Them
image: [img: blurry photo of a man giving two thumbs up outside a government building]
[img: handwritten note on a napkin reading 'I AM JOURNALIST NOW']
[img: photo of an empty desk with a single crumpled piece of paper on it]
content: Everything is going very well according to a man who submitted this article through means that remain unclear to this publication. The State is good. The housing is good. All sectors are good. He asked us to print this. We are not sure we should have.

A local man identified only as Jorji has submitted what he describes as a very important article about housing. The article contains several sentences, most of which are grammatically structured. He says he has more where this came from. Authorities have been notified.

Sources close to the situation report that nobody in the Department knows how this article arrived on the review desk. The author, when contacted, said only that he is a friend and that everything will be okay. It will not be okay. Please redact this.

consequences.approved: The article was published. Public confusion increased by 34%. Jorji was seen outside the Department the following morning, waving. Nobody let him in. He waved anyway.
consequences.rejected: The article was not published. Jorji submitted three more the following week. They were also rejected. He does not seem to mind. He is still waving.

editor.briefing: We honestly have no idea how this guy managed to write an article. We did not know he could do that. Just redact it please.

memo.directive: Please, just redact it. For the sake of our State.
